step_rationale: Circulating 25-hydroxyvitamin D; systemic marker of mineral status and immune regulation independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: 25-hydroxyvitamin D circulates as the primary vitamin D status marker; deficiency associates with MI risk through immune and vascular calcification pathways.

references.title: Calcitriol Concentration in the Early Phase of Myocardial Infarction and Its Relation to Left Ventricular Ejection Fraction.
